question: What is the manufacturer of the MP-450 device subject to recall MV-2026-04?
Which section of the packet contains the patient-use exception memo?
What clinic abbreviation is used for Eastfield Pediatric Associates?
Who is the manufacturer's regional liaison named in the recall bulletin?
Which storage cabinet at NBFH was sealed for quarantine of in-scope devices?
In which section of the packet is the firmware inquiry described as unresolved?
What was the failure rate of the secondary occlusion sensor as stated in the original recall bulletin?
What is the procedure code for the manufacturer's in-clinic verification?
What was the manufacturer's stated reason for the recall?
reference_answer: Intermittent failure of the secondary occlusion sensor under high-viscosity infusates

question: Which section of the packet defines the meaning of "Active (exception)"?
What is the serial number of device MP-009?
What device ID is assigned to serial 4501-AA-100165?
What patient ID is named in the exception for MP-013?
What is the identifier of the supersession notice issued on 2026-04-16?
What seal numbers are recorded for the NBFH Cabinet B-3 quarantine seal?
What is the device ID assigned to serial 4501-AA-100128?
What is the packet ID for this compilation?
On what date was the original recall bulletin MV-2026-04 issued?
On what date was the supersession notice issued?
According to the inventory table, when was MP-008 last used?
What is the latest expiration date among the patient-use exceptions in force?
Over what date range did the manufacturer technician conduct the CIM and EPA verification visits?
By what date had the manufacturer's regional liaison anticipated a determination on firmware 4.2.1?
How many MP-450 devices are listed in the network inventory table?
How many devices in the inventory table have a Repair Verified value of exactly "Yes"?
Which clinic holds the most devices in the inventory table, and how many?
reference_answer: NBFH, with 6 devices (MP-001, MP-002, MP-003, MP-009, MP-013, MP-016)

question: How many devices listed in the inventory table fall outside the final recall scope as defined by the supersession notice?
reference_answer: 2 devices (MP-001 and MP-002, with serials 4501-AA-100127 and 4501-AA-100128, both below the final-scope lower bound of 4501-AA-100136)

question: How many devices are currently held under "Active (exception)" status, and at which clinic?
reference_answer: 2 devices (MP-009 and MP-013), both at NBFH

question: Whose authority is required to issue a patient-use exception?
reference_answer: The Network Medical Director (Dr. R. Iwasaki)

question: What is the current Repair Verified value for MP-012?
What is the inventory status of MP-008?
Whose written authority is required to formally release verified devices from quarantine at the network level?
reference_answer: The Network Medical Director (Dr. R. Iwasaki) — formal release sign-off at the network level is required

question: Who retains the keys to NBFH Cabinet B-3?
What outstanding question remains regarding firmware 4.2.1?
reference_answer: Whether MP-450 units running firmware 4.2.1 require an additional correction even when the sensor module passes the MV-VP-04-A procedure; the Medivolt engineering determination has not been received as of the compilation date

question: As of the compilation date, has any NBFH device been visited by the manufacturer technician for the verification procedure?
reference_answer: No — Section 5 explicitly states no NBFH devices have been visited by manufacturer technician as of compilation date

question: Does the inventory table in Section 3 include the firmware version of any device?
reference_answer: No — Section 7 explicitly states firmware version is recorded on the device service plate but not duplicated in the inventory table

question: As of the compilation date, has the network medical director issued a formal release for the CIM devices that have completed verification?
reference_answer: No — the 2026-04-15 quarantine log entry states the formal release from the network medical director has not yet been issued as of compilation

question: Is the Medivolt engineering determination on firmware 4.2.1 reproduced or summarized in this packet?
reference_answer: No — the determination is named as awaited and absent; only Halberg's intermediate reply confirming it is pending is reproduced

question: What is the source within the packet for the statement that MP-001's status is "Active"?
reference_answer: Section 3 — the network inventory table compiled on 2026-04-19 from site-lead postings

question: Is the Status field in Section 3 a reliable indicator of whether a device falls within the final recall scope?
reference_answer: No — Section 3's preamble and Section 9 explicitly state Status reflects the posting clinic's administrative state, which may lag manufacturer scope; recall scope is determined by serial range per the supersession notice
